scope: Coheronia v0.3: berry regrowth, dynamic population, storm hazard with roof mitigation, lanterns, UX polish; includes a subagent verification/optimization loop.
summary: Implements the v0.3 slate inline (features overlap in the same six files, so parallel implementation agents were rejected as conflict-prone), then closes a verification loop: (1) the smoke suite itself caught that storm exposure keyed on shelter_score could never deal damage because ground fill under the hall saturates the score - rekeyed to roof_coverage() so each hazard has a distinct counter (storm->roof, slime->walls, darkness->light); (2) an independent read-only subagent reviewed the diff and returned 9 findings, all applied; (3) suite re-passed 47/47 headless and windowed.
acceptance: Harvested berry bushes start a 90s regrow timer, regrow in place, and the timer survives save/load
Population drops on a starved dawn, grows on a fed dawn with coherence >= 55 and food surplus, floors at 1 and caps at 8; food need scales as ceil(pop/2)
Forced storm raises threat severity 0->8 and damages the unroofed hall (0->1.52 over 30 frames); a full 7-column roof drops coverage-scaled damage to zero (1.52->1.52)
Lantern crafted at the Town Hall from stockpile (2 ore + 1 wood), placed from hotbar slot 5, emits light
Storm state and regrow timers persist across the save/load round trip; pre-v0.3 saves load without a surprise storm re-roll
All 34 pre-existing checks unchanged; suite total 47/47, exit 0, screenshot reviewed (roofed hall, lantern, threat warning, save hint, settler-arrival log)
validation: COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 headless -> SMOKE RESULT: PASS (47/47), exit 0
Subagent diff review (agent a694b79a): 9 findings, 9 applied, re-verified
decisions: Implementation kept inline rather than parallel subagents: the five features share game_root/world/hud/town_hall/save/smoke files and context was already resident; subagents used for what they are good at - independent verification
Storm mitigation keyed to roof coverage above the hall (scanning to world top), not shelter_score, after the smoke test proved ground fill made shelter-based exposure unwinnable for the storm
Population growth reads a pre-meal dawn coherence snapshot to avoid re-entrant recompute ordering issues
Save version 0.3 accepts 0.1/0.2 saves; missing keys default safely, including storm_rolled_today derived from time_of_day
risks: Widened tuning surface untested by human play (storm 50%/day at 3 dps, growth threshold 55, regrow 90s)
Roof coverage assumes the current 7-column hall footprint
next_action: Operator playthrough (storm with/without roof, grow to 8 settlers), then v0.4 scoping.
